global_description: A small, stocky seabird with a compact body and short neck. It has predominantly black plumage on the upper parts and white underparts. The bird features a distinctive orange-red bill and a white facial plume extending from the eye. Its wings are short and rounded, and it has a short tail.

part_details.bill: Short, thick, and bright orange-red, slightly curved.
part_details.plumage: Black on the back and wings, white on the belly and underparts.
part_details.facial_plume: Thin white line extending from the eye backward.
part_details.wings: Short, rounded, black with a glossy sheen.

spatial_relations: The white facial plume extends backward from the eye.
The orange-red bill is positioned at the front of the face.
The black wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The short tail is located at the rear of the body.
